<?php namespace Hamcrest\Type; /* Copyright (c) 2010 hamcrest.org */ use Hamcrest\Core\IsTypeOf; /** * Tests whether the value is an array. */ class IsArray extends IsTypeOf { /** * Creates a new instance of IsArray */ public function __construct() { parent::__construct('array'); } /** * Is the value an array? * * @factory */ public static function arrayValue() { return new self; } }
